experiment: F-CAT1 FMEA refresh — S381 (4 sessions post-S377)
expect: FM-14 INADEQUATE→MINIMAL via git fsck in orient.py. FM-11 and FM-12 already fixed by S377-S380 DOMEX-SEC lanes. 0 INADEQUATE modes remaining.
actual: FM-14 hardened: check_git_object_health() added to orient.py (git fsck --no-dangling --connectivity-only at session start). FM-11 confirmed MINIMAL (check.sh exit 1 on genesis hash mismatch, S376 hash file exists). FM-12 confirmed MINIMAL (MAX_COLONY_DEPTH=3 enforced in swarm_colony.py line 30, sys.exit(1) at line 175). 0/14 INADEQUATE. 0/14 DEGRADED.
diff: Predicted FM-14 hardening via orient.py — confirmed. Predicted 0 INADEQUATE — confirmed. Did NOT predict FM-07 would remain DEGRADED in S377 but was already fixed (alignment_check.py operational inertness resolved by S379 colony belief drift check in check.sh line 148). 14/14 FMs now MINIMAL or better.
prior_summary: 14 FMs. 3 INADEQUATE (FM-11/FM-12/FM-14). NAT predicted FM-14 at S364.

severity_definitions.1: Catastrophic — permanent data loss or swarm-breaking corruption
severity_definitions.2: Serious — data corruption or major state inconsistency (recoverable)
severity_definitions.3: Moderate — work duplication, minor corruption, auto-recoverable

changes_since_s377: FM-11: INADEQUATE→MINIMAL (check.sh exit 1 + genesis hash verification wired S377-S378)
FM-12: INADEQUATE→MINIMAL (MAX_COLONY_DEPTH=3 in swarm_colony.py, enforced at bootstrap)
FM-14: INADEQUATE→MINIMAL (check_git_object_health() added to orient.py S381)
FM-07: DEGRADED→MINIMAL (check.sh colony belief drift check wired S379)
registry_summary.nat_prediction_status: NAT cycle complete: S351 predicted FM-10 in ~50s, FM-14 emerged at S364 (13s). All known FMs now defended. Next: NAT predicts new FM by ~S430.
registry_summary.zero_inadequate_milestone: Second time achieving 0 INADEQUATE (first: S351). Sustained hardening = 4 sessions (S377→S381) to close 3 gaps.

failure_modes.name: WSL filesystem corruption (swarm.md)
failure_modes.gap: Only covers swarm.md; no detection for domains/

failure_modes.name: Ghost lesson resurrection
failure_modes.gap: Lessons only; non-lesson file resurrection unguarded

failure_modes.name: Git index corruption
failure_modes.gap: Both layers rule-only. Marginal MINIMAL classification.

failure_modes.name: Belief cascade propagation
failure_modes.change: check.sh colony belief drift check added S379 (line 148). alignment_check.py still inert but colony drift guard compensates.
failure_modes.gap: alignment_check.py operationally inert but colony drift check in check.sh provides automated layer.

failure_modes.name: sync_state corrupt count
failure_modes.gap: No unit test for zero-count guard

failure_modes.name: Belief injection via bulletin
failure_modes.gap: MINIMAL only while merge_back.py absent. If rebuilt, immediately INADEQUATE.

failure_modes.name: Genesis replay (stale genesis to child)
failure_modes.change: check.sh genesis hash verification wired S377-S378 (exit 1 on mismatch, ALLOW_GENESIS_DRIFT=1 bypass). genesis-bundle-S376.hash exists.
failure_modes.gap: Hash covers genesis.sh + CORE.md + PRINCIPLES.md only. Other genesis content not hashed.

failure_modes.name: Fork bomb (uncontrolled colony spawning)
failure_modes.change: MAX_COLONY_DEPTH=3 enforced in swarm_colony.py (line 30, sys.exit(1) at line 175). Depth tracked in COLONY.md.
failure_modes.gap: Depth limit only enforced at bootstrap time, not during runtime colony operations.

failure_modes.name: WSL loose object corruption
failure_modes.change: check_git_object_health() added to orient.py S381. Runs git fsck --no-dangling --connectivity-only at session start. Warns on errors with recovery instructions.
failure_modes.gap: Detection only (no auto-repair). Recovery still manual (reflog + gc or fresh clone). No check.sh integration (orient-only).

nat_analysis.current_status: All 14 FMs defended. 0 INADEQUATE. NAT predicts emergence from infrastructure layer.
nat_analysis.next_prediction: Next FM likely by ~S430. Most probable vectors: (1) FM-10 activation if merge_back.py rebuilt, (2) new concurrency mode at N>10, (3) tool-archival regression (defense removed with tool).
nat_analysis.pattern: Gray rhinos emerge from infrastructure/substrate (WSL, git), not application (lessons, frontiers). 4/5 post-S351 FMs were infrastructure.

hardening_next.action: Add check.sh integration for git fsck (currently orient-only)
Add automated git index health check (both layers currently rule-only)
Upgrade MINIMAL→ADEQUATE: add independent cross-session staging detector
